x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for ITSM requires Xanadu or later. Running Now Assist on an unsupported release will produce errors, missing features, or degraded AI functionality that cannot be resolved without upgrading.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Plan an upgrade to the latest Generally Available release (Zurich or newer). Now Assist ITSM capabilities expand with each release. Engage ServiceNow account team for upgrade planning.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c27
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist for ITSM requires Xanadu or later. Running Now Assist on an unsupported release will produce errors, missing features, or degraded AI functionality that cannot be resolved without upgrading.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Platform Release Version</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Filter for platform upgrades only (glide- prefix excludes app installs)
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_upgrade_history');
    gr.addQuery('to_version', 'STARTSWITH', 'glide-');
    gr.orderByDesc('sys_created_on');
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();

    if (!gr.next()) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: 'No platform upgrade history found',
            finding: 'No platform upgrade history found. Cannot determine instance release currency for Now Assist compatibility.'
        };
    }

    var version = gr.getValue('to_version') || '';
    var vLower = version.toLowerCase();
    var actualValue = 'Version: ' + version;

    var isCurrentGen = vLower.indexOf('zurich') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('yokohama') > -1 ||
                       vLower.indexOf('2025') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('2026') > -1;
    var isPreviousGen = vLower.indexOf('xanadu') > -1 || vLower.indexOf('washington') > -1 ||
                        vLower.indexOf('vancouver') > -1;

    if (isCurrentGen) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance is on a current-generation release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Full Now Assist ITSM and AI Agent capabilities are available.'
        };
    } else if (isPreviousGen) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance is on a previous-generation release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Some Now Assist ITSM features may be unavailable. Plan upgrade to Zurich or later.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Instance may be on an older release (' + version.split('__')[0] + '). Now Assist ITSM requires Xanadu or newer — upgrade is required before AI capabilities can be fully enabled.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITSM</module>
<number>CHK0005963</number>
<order>240</order>
<remediation_guidance>Plan an upgrade to the latest Generally Available release (Zurich or newer). Now Assist ITSM capabilities expand with each release. Engage ServiceNow account team for upgrade planning.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c27</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
